name: inbox-command-center
description: Inbox Command Center — AI communications manager that triages Gmail, Slack, iMessage, and messaging platforms. Auto-categorizes messages, drafts replies in your authentic voice (learned from transcripts, phone calls, sent emails, Slack messages, and A/B calibration), manages calendar conflicts, tracks tasks, creates smart rules with delete/prioritization/folder-based options, delivers scheduled daily briefings and VIP summaries with pre-written drafts, generates monthly inbox reports with full analytics, and sends reminders via dedicated Slack channel, Slack DM, or iMessage. Integrates with Brand Knowledge Center for brand-voice drafting.
